default.text: The Knights found the white key just sitting there at that museum. Doesn't seem fair that we have to go searching all over the place for the black one.

sass.text: The Knights found the white key just sitting there at that museum. Doesn't seem fair that we have to go searching all over the place for the black one.

soft.text: I used to think it would be fun to watch Benham City get brickified and crumble into pieces. I never really saw how beautiful it is.

angry.text: Typical. You really thought that would work on me?
